strategy_reasoning: For a 1,3-dipolar cycloaddition with a thermal reaction profile, we should explore a range of residence times to ensure comprehensive kinetic data. The reaction is not photochemical or gas-liquid, so we can use larger diameters. Given the IF class range of 20×, we will sample up to 2× the center tau. Linear spacing is appropriate due to the narrow range.

problem_statement.flow_justification_note: The reaction time (tau_batch_equiv) is very short, suggesting potential benefits from flow chemistry for precise control and scalability.
